mapper.select: select ( select count(1) from purchase_request pr where pr.deleted = 0 and pr.status = 'PENDING_APPROVAL' ) as pendingApprovalRequestCount, ( select count(1) from purchase_order po where po.deleted = 0 and po.status = 'WAIT_CONFIRM' ) as waitConfirmOrderCount, ( select count(1) from purchase_order po where po.deleted = 0 and po.status in ('IN_PROGRESS', 'PARTIAL_ARRIVAL', 'WAIT_INBOUND') ) as inProgressOrderCount, ( select count(1) from arrival a where a.deleted = 0 and not exists ( select 1 from inbound i where i.arrival_id = a.id and i.deleted = 0 and i.status = 'COMPLETED' ) ) as pendingInboundArrivalCount, ( select count(1) from inventory inv inner join material m on inv.material_id = m.id where inv.deleted = 0 and m.deleted = 0 and ( (m.safety_number is not null and inv.current_number < m.safety_number) or (m.upper_number is not null and inv.current_number > m.upper_number) ) ) as inventoryAlertCount, ( select count(1) from inventory inv inner join material m on inv.material_id = m.id where inv.deleted = 0 and m.deleted = 0 and m.safety_number is not null and inv.current_number < m.safety_number ) as lowStockCount, ( select count(1) from inventory inv inner join material m on inv.material_id = m.id where inv.deleted = 0 and m.deleted = 0 and m.upper_number is not null and inv.current_number > m.upper_number ) as overStockCount, ( select count(1) from arrival a where a.deleted = 0 and ( a.status = 'ABNORMAL' or (a.unqualified_number is not null and a.unqualified_number > 0) ) ) as abnormalArrivalCount
